How We Work Our Work About Start your free discovery
Digital Marketing

Turn lookers into direct bookings.

A booking-ready website, professional photography and direct-booking campaigns, so guests find you, choose you, and book direct with you.

Start your free discovery
The problem

Your most profitable bookings come direct, when guests can find you and want to book there.

Of everything that drives revenue, digital marketing is the most overlooked, and it's the lowest cost way to sell a room online. Every point of acquisition cost you remove goes straight to net profit.

Guests who book direct are your most profitable, and the opportunity is making that channel the one they want to use. A fast, modern website that’s easy to book on, photography that does the rooms justice, and campaigns that bring guests to your own channel, that’s what turns interest into direct bookings, and builds the guest relationship that lowers your cost of acquisition over time.

Revenue management sets the price. Digital marketing sells it. Run together, they give guests a real reason to book direct, and they protect the integrity of your direct rate so it isn't quietly undercut elsewhere.

What Indi does

The actual work.

01

Website + booking engine

A fast, modern site built to convert, with booking built in.

02

Professional photography

Imagery that makes your property look as good as it is, also a live sample of our work.

03

Direct-booking campaigns

Driving qualified guests to your own channel.

04

Positioning

A clear, consistent story for your property across every touchpoint.

05

Metasearch & visibility

Showing up where guests compare and decide.

How it's delivered

Built in onboarding. Run at the intensity you choose.

Your marketing strategy is built and launched in onboarding, then driven and refined through your ongoing partnership. Two of the highest-impact pieces, a new website + booking engine and professional photography, are also available as standalone projects, and both are built to hand off into ongoing marketing if you want it.

See how we work See standalone projects Works hand in hand with revenue management

Michael Stephens · Owner · Albany Motel & Apartments
